agent: PRN Negeri Sembilan 2026 Sentiment Analysis Agent (cron)

priority_tagged_entities_rev4_delta.note: Some entities carry multiple PIR tags (e.g., N.14 Ampangan = PIR-07+PIR-09+PIR-06). Unique priority-tagged entities in rev4 delta: 12 of 15.

trends.overall_rev4: PH-FAVORABLE TILT STRENGTHENS; OPPOSITION-COHESION NEGATIVES DEEPEN. The dominant development of Cycle 5/6 is the ESCALATION of the PIR-06 PN-removal-of-Bersatu thread from a precursor (rev3: NST headline 'has grounds') to SENIOR-FIGURE PUBLIC ADVOCACY (rev4: Kiandee full Utusan body, 'asas kukuh', MP Beluran). The PH-favorable structural tilt deepens (SPR-confirmed configuration + Aminuddin defensive-governance + Azizul civil framing + Fuziah measured strategy), while new PIR-09 negatives (Gerakan expulsion of Tang Jay Son; Rafie cross-bloc defector) add opposition-credibility pressure. No entity exceeds the 30% numeric shift threshold; the material movement is qualitative (PIR-06 escalation) and the introduction of new PIR-09 negative entities.
trends.pir06_trend: ESCALATING toward formalization. Progression across the day: 15:09 'could face termination' → 16:33 'info chief floats termination' → 19:19 'has grounds to remove' (NST, Kiandee) → 22:20 SENIOR-FIGURE PUBLIC ADVOCACY (Kiandee full body, 'asas kukuh'). Trigger #2 (coalition restructuring) ADJACENT. No formal PN Supreme Council removal notice yet.
trends.pir09_trend: TWO new credibility events on Day 1: (1) Gerakan expels Tang Jay Son (immediate effect, Bersatu ticket in N.22 Rahang); (2) Mohamad Rafie (2018 PH winner) now contests N.14 Ampangan for PN-PAS — cross-bloc defector framing. PLUS Bujang Abu eligibility failure (marginal, NOT a trigger). The defector/disciplinary pattern supports the broader PIR-06 fracture.
trends.pir07_trend: Day-1 campaign active across 8 watch seats. Marquee: Chennah (Loke vs BN), Rantau (Tok Mat vs Azizul — civil 'friendship match'), Linggi (MB Aminuddin, 3-corner), Ampangan (50/50 messaging war). BN momentum: Jalaluddin Jelebu procession + 'way forward' manifesto (launch 24 Jul DUN Linggi). PH: defensive-governance + civil framing + measured strategy + 50/50 candour. 69% of seats multi-cornered; 2 five-cornered (N.10, N.33) — trigger #7 WATCH.
trends.negative_sentiment_trend: Opposition-cohesion negatives deepening: Bersatu-PN fracture (ESC-011) 0.72→0.75; Bersatu (party) 0.68→0.70; PN-removal-of-Bersatu thread (ESC-014) escalated to senior-figure advocacy. New PIR-09 negatives: Tang Jay Son 0.60 (Gerakan expulsion), Rafie 0.58 (defector). All maximally favourable to PH.
trends.positive_sentiment_trend: PH-favorable positives reinforced: Aminuddin 0.60→0.61 (defensive-governance + 'kubu orang'); Azizul (civil framing) NEW 0.53; Jalaluddin (BN momentum, cross-bloc) NEW 0.55. SPR party breakdown CONFIRMED (positive analytical confidence).
trends.neutral_sentiment_trend: Battleground/leadership neutrals: N.14 Ampangan (Day-1 messaging war) NEW 0.50; Nazri (PH, 50/50) NEW 0.48; MB-candidate deferred NEW 0.50; Fuziah/PKR measured framing NEW 0.52; Bujang Abu withdrawal (marginal) NEW 0.45.
trends.numeric_shift_threshold: No entity exceeds 30% numeric shift in rev3→rev4 delta (largest: ESC-011 +4.2%, Bersatu +2.9%, Aminuddin +1.7%). No direction flips.

PIR-06.directive: Sentiment around PN-Bersatu relationship (removal, expulsion, withdrawal narratives)
PIR-06.assessment: ESCALATING toward formalization. Senior-figure public advocacy (Kiandee) for PN Supreme Council to remove Bersatu. Trigger #2 adjacent. No formal removal notice yet (status: precursor/lead). Maximally favourable to PH.
key_entities: Ronald Kiandee (suspended Bersatu VP / MP Beluran)

PIR-09.directive: Sentiment around candidate credibility (disciplinary actions, defections, eligibility)
PIR-09.assessment: TWO new Day-1 credibility events: Gerakan expels Tang Jay Son (Bersatu ticket, N.22 Rahang); Mohamad Rafie (2018 PH winner) cross-bloc defector to PN-PAS (N.14 Ampangan). PLUS Bujang Abu eligibility failure (marginal).

PIR-07.directive: Sentiment around battleground seats (campaign momentum, candidate reception)
PIR-07.assessment: Day-1 campaign active across 8 watch seats. BN momentum (Jalaluddin Jelebu + manifesto 24 Jul). PH (Aminuddin defensive + Azizul civil + Fuziah measured). 69% multi-cornered; 2 five-cornered — trigger #7 WATCH.

PIR-06_critical_shift.prior_state_rev3: ESC-014 CRITICAL — precursor (NST headline 'has grounds to remove').
PIR-06_critical_shift.new_state_rev4: ESCALATED — senior-figure public advocacy (Kiandee full Utusan body, 'asas kukuh').
PIR-06_critical_shift.classification: CRITICAL PIR-06 SENTIMENT SHIFT (qualitative escalation toward formal coalition restructuring)
PIR-06_critical_shift.trigger_proximity: Escalation trigger #2 (coalition restructuring) ADJACENT — closest the cycle has come to a trigger firing.

revision_history.verdict: Nomination Day opens opposition-fractured; PN-Bersatu split dominant; PH-favorable.
PN-Bersatu split three-way (Bersatu vs PN+PAS); mutual on-the-record confrontation.
PN 'has grounds to remove Bersatu' (Kiandee, NST) — toward formalization; PH machinery mobilisation (Ramanan).

Senior-figure public advocacy for PN removal of Bersatu (Kiandee, Utusan body) — CRITICAL PIR-06 escalation; 2 new PIR-09 credibility events (Gerakan expulsion of Tang Jay Son; Rafie defector); Day-1 PIR-07 campaign momentum. Trigger #2 adjacent. No trigger fired.

Update the entity gazetteer to include Ronald Kiandee (PIR-06 key monitor target) and Bujang Abu.

Monitor PN/Bersatu/PAS official channels + Kiandee Facebook (CONFIRMED active signal source) for any formal PN Supreme Council removal notice, Bersatu retaliation, or candidate withdrawals in the 8 head-to-head seats.
Backfill the 20260716 sentiment-analysis gap (Day 8, 1-day gap in time series).

verdict: CAMPAIGN DAY 1 (late-cycle) DEEPENS the PH-favorable Nomination-Day verdict. The PIR-06 PN-removal-of-Bersatu thread ESCALATES from precursor (rev3) to SENIOR-FIGURE PUBLIC ADVOCACY (Kiandee, Utusan full body, 'asas kukuh'); trigger #2 adjacent; no formal removal notice yet. PIR-09 activates with 2 new Day-1 credibility events (Gerakan expulsion of Tang Jay Son; Rafie cross-bloc defector). PIR-07 shows active Day-1 campaign momentum (BN Jalaluddin + PH Aminuddin/Azizul). No entity exceeds the 30% numeric shift threshold; the PIR-06 qualitative escalation is FLAGGED as a CRITICAL sentiment shift per director directive. Net NS-relevant sentiment remains PH-favorable: opposition self-fragmentation (Bersatu 24 seats, fighting allies in 20/24) and escalation toward a formal Bersatu-PN split maximally benefit the incumbent. No nomination-period trigger fired; trigger #7 (independents in 5-cornered seats N.10/N.33) on WATCH. CLASSIFICATION: TLP:AMBER.
